title: Cost-effectiveness of a bevacizumab biosimilar for the treatment of recurrent, platinum-sensitive ovarian cancer in the United States.
abstract: While bevacizumab may benefit patients with recurrent, platinum-sensitive epithelial ovarian cancer (EOC), its use is inconsistent. In part, this may be due to its cost. To assess whether a lower-cost biosimilar (bevacizumab-awwb) could be cost-effective, we evaluated the cost-effectiveness of bevacizumab-awwb in combination with platinum-based chemotherapy versus chemotherapy alone in this setting.
